title: Lac de Tavaneuse
summary:
Lac de Tavaneuse (French pronunciation: [lak də tavanøz]) is a lake at Abondance in Haute-Savoie, France. Positioned at an elevation of approximately 1,805 meters, within the region Chablais Massif.
Hiking routes to the lake often begin from Prétairié, with trails passing through meadows, forests, and waterfalls.
